system.notes:
Sacrificing Cultist, Supernatural

She worships the Gaping Maw, the Runnel of Life, the Cosmic Thirst. She builds a cult, teaching them to hunt and conduct rituals. Then she moves on. Witnesses uneasily describe her supernatural abilities, including shapeshifting, flight, killing people by attacking their shadows, and so on.

Bereaved relatives, rival cultists, and law enforcers all want her stopped. She hires outsiders to threaten, misdirect, or kill law enforcement. Determined inspectors crush cults she trained, need help to catch her.
